board_csa_architect.notes: SERIAL-to-UUID is essential for multi-tenant scalability. Baseline-first approach prevents data loss. ERD commitment creates permanent schema visibility. pg_dump --schema-only is the correct source of truth, not SQL files. Recommend indexing all new UUID FKs.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: UUID eliminates sequential ID guessing attack vector. Dual-connection architecture (REQ-SEC-03) must be preserved during migration. RLS policies across all 5 schemas must be re-verified post-migration. Recovery codes and auth tables already use UUID - no security regression.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Vector embeddings (768-dim) and JSONB columns in memories and agent_procedures must be handled carefully during migration. No VRAM impact - this is purely DB layer. Migration tool must support pgvector extension. TypeScript-compatible tooling aligns with stack.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: 3 AM test: migration must be idempotent and reversible. Docker entrypoint swap from init scripts to migration runner is critical path. Recommend down migrations for rollback. Startup integrity check prevents schema drift in production. Phase K prerequisite - must complete before pilot.
